positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist depiction of a celestial garden at twilight. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, oversized flora (e.g., bioluminescent lilies, crescent moons, starburst ferns) floating within a deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. Incorporate ethereal gold leaf veins and silver ink accents for a luxurious, magical feel. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes against the gradient, allowing for excellent fabric printing. The mood is serene and mystical. Graphic elements should be highly detailed yet simplified for maximum visual impact on apparel. Flat lay presentation, isolated on a white background, perfect for printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, dirty, messy, writing
